title: Market Research Consultant, Specialist
required_skills: Insights team experience in financial services
Brand research and actionable insight delivery
bonus_skills: B2B and D2C Financial Services experience
EU office travel flexibility (London, Frankfurt, Zurich, Milan, Madrid, Paris)
matched_skills: B2B experience (HSBC, GRG Banking, Intelligent Power Corporation)
C-level data storytelling and executive reporting
Quantitative data analysis and actionable insight delivery
missing_skills: Dedicated brand research experience (brand tracking, brand health studies)
Qualitative research methodology (focus groups, ethnography, in-depth interviews)
Continental European market insight strategy ownership
core_responsibilities: Gather client and brand insights across the business; report on internal and macro trends
Analyse qualitative and quantitative research data; present prioritised, actionable findings
Build and develop relationships with senior stakeholders and external agencies
Determine Brand Insight strategy for the Continental European business
Educate colleagues on qualitative and quantitative research methods
recommended_emphasis: HSBC financial services analytics experience — highlight regulatory and information-security-aware reporting environment
Stakeholder storytelling at C-suite level — frame as equivalent to senior stakeholder insight communication
B2B market research and competitive intelligence work (GRG Banking, Intelligent Power) — position as brand and market insight delivery
Multi-market EMEA/APAC coverage — directly relevant to Continental European office network
Qualitative dimension of customer journey analysis (Hapag-Lloyd user research) — surface as qualitative insight experience
Market segmentation frameworks — align to brand insight segmentation and audience strategy
